summary_short: Value Pawn & Jewelry is a pawn shops provider with 31 locations across the US.
summary_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry is a pawn shop operator that provides collateral-based lending and the purchase and sale of used merchandise. The company serves customers seeking short-term loans secured by personal items such as jewelry, electronics, and other goods, as well as those interested in buying or selling used items.

The company operates 31 locations across the United States, with significant presence in Florida and Georgia. In addition to pawn lending services, Value Pawn & Jewelry buys and sells jewelry, electronics, collectibles, and other personal goods at its retail locations.

Pawn shop loans carry interest rates and fees that vary by location and are regulated by state and local law. Customers should be aware that defaulting on a pawn loan results in forfeiture of the collateralized item. Alternative short-term financing options include bank loans, credit unions, and online lenders, which may have different eligibility requirements and terms.

faq.q: What types of items does Value Pawn & Jewelry accept as collateral?
faq.a: The company typically accepts jewelry, electronics, collectibles, musical instruments, and other personal goods, though specific items accepted and their valuations vary by location.

faq.q: How many Value Pawn & Jewelry locations are there?
faq.a: The company operates 31 locations primarily across Florida and Georgia. Specific location addresses and hours are typically available by contacting the company directly.

faq.q: What should customers know about pawn shop loans and fees?
faq.a: Pawn loans are short-term, collateral-based transactions subject to state and local regulations. Interest rates and fees vary by location, and failure to repay the loan results in forfeiture of the pledged item.
